summary: Iteration 52: Tested renewal flow fixes including PATCH endpoint with latitude/longitude/geofence_radius fields, payment sync endpoints (asyncio.to_thread wrapping), and renewal modal UI with 4 buttons (Cancel, Generate MOU, Save as Draft, Complete Renewal).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Renewal flow is working correctly. The renewal modal opens via hover dropdown on Active Schools cards (Renewal button > Direct Renewal option). Modal has all 4 buttons: Cancel, Generate MOU, Save as Draft, Complete Renewal. Backend accepts latitude, longitude, geofence_radius fields. Payment sync endpoints use asyncio.to_thread() for Cashfree SDK calls.
features_verified: PATCH /api/schools/inquiry/{id} accepts latitude, longitude, geofence_radius fields
Renewal modal has 4 buttons: Cancel, Generate MOU, Save as Draft, Complete Renewal
Save as Draft saves onboarding_data without changing status
Payment sync endpoints (sync-all, sync-single) don't crash server
Server stays responsive after payment sync operations
